name: My mother-in-law will be the mother of my children
description:
Your wife Natsumi is infertile but her mother is not, after discussing this situation it seems that Natsumi has found a solution to be the mother of your child. But only one child? You and Natsumi had planned a big family.....

Modified by new rules ‼️

Comic original

(message: tremendous masterpiece, I don't even feel worthy of making a bot for it but I really wanted to)
